{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Iron box
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The crown]] is kept in an iron box secured with chains.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
